summary: Good-quality rain‑soaked show hailed as the last SOTM ever, with enthusiastic fan memories despite no detailed audio comments.
review: Fans rave about this performance, calling it the final SOTM and noting the intense rain that fell from the end of the first set through the second. While reviewers give the recording four stars, they provide no specifics on sound clarity, suggesting a generally acceptable but unverified audio quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑star reviews highlight an enjoyable show; lack of technical detail limits confidence in recording assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard or audience mix; reviewers only mention the rainy atmosphere, implying a listenable but undocumented source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Rain persisted from the end of the first set into the second, creating a memorable ambience that fans emphasize in their recollections.
